// Schema for stage 1a: Chunk label reco: Output from labelling agents after reading chunks. Contains both scaffold (deterministic) and interpretive (LLM-filled) fields
title: Stage 1a Chunk Label Record

chunk_index.description: Index of the chunk (scaffold field, deterministic)

start.description: Starting word index in the original transcript

end.description: Ending word index in the original transcript

word_range.description: Word range of the chunk (scaffold field, deterministic)

timestamp_range.description: Timestamp range if applicable (scaffold field, deterministic, may be omitted if no timestamps)

speaker_tags.description: List of speakers in this chunk if identified (scaffold field, deterministic, may be omitted if no speakers)

word_count.description: Total word count of the chunk (scaffold field, deterministic)

raw_source_text.description: Original text of the chunk (scaffold field, deterministic)

topic_tags.description: Topic tags for this chunk (LLM-filled, alphanumeric with underscores)

key_entities.description: Key entities mentioned in the chunk (LLM-filled)

speaker_intent.description: Intent of the speaker (LLM-filled, always required)

intent_rationale.description: Rationale for intent interpretation (LLM-filled, always required)
